items.promptRawJa: Dans la nuit, sur la route où il n'y a pas de lampe ou la condition d'éclairage est mauvaise, il faut remplacer le feu de croisement par le feu de route. Mais le véhicule suivant roulant dans le meme sens ne peut pas utiliser le feu de route.
items.promptGlossEn: At night, on a road without streetlights or with poor lighting conditions, you must replace the low beam with the high beam headlights. However, a following vehicle driving in the same direction cannot use the high beam headlights.

localizedText.prompt: Dans la nuit, sur la route où il n'y a pas de lampe ou la condition d'éclairage est mauvaise, il faut remplacer le feu de croisement par le feu de route. Mais le véhicule suivant roulant dans le meme sens ne peut pas utiliser le feu de route.

translatedText.prompt: At night, on a road without streetlights or with poor lighting conditions, you must replace the low beam with the high beam headlights. However, a following vehicle driving in the same direction cannot use the high beam headlights.

topCandidates.prompt: When driving at night on a road with no or poor lighting, the driver should switch from the low beam light to the high beam light. But the vehicle following in the same direction is not allowed to use the high beam light.
topCandidates.syntheticJaPrompt: when driving night road いいえ or poor lighting 運転者 べき switch low-beam ライト high-beam ライト but 後続車 same direction してはならない use high-beam ライト。
topCandidates.translatedPrompt: 조명이 없거나 부족한 도로에서 야간 운전 시 운전자는 하향등에서 상향등으로 전환해야 한다. 그러나 같은 방향으로 진행하는 뒤차는 상향등을 사용해서는 안 된다.

topCandidates.prompt: WWhen you see a car at night whose driver has not switched off their high beams, you are allowed to switch your headlights from high beam to low beam to indicate this to the oncoming driver, and at the same time you should slow down and drive (or stop) on the right side of the road.

topCandidates.translatedPrompt: 야간에 대향차와 마주칠 때 운전자는 상대 차량에 신호하기 위해 전조등을 연속으로 깜박일 수 있으며, 동시에 감속하여 진행하거나 우측에 정차해야 한다.

topCandidates.prompt: When a vehicle goes at night through an intersection that has no traffic lights, the driver should not use the high and low beam lights alternately.
